feature: AI Answer Markdown Formatting and Chat Context Persistence with Rolling Window

markdown_security.library: Use react-markdown with rehype-sanitize plugin for XSS protection
markdown_security.configuration: Restrict allowed elements to safe HTML tags (p, strong, em, code, pre, ul, ol, li, blockquote, a)
markdown_security.url_filtering: Block javascript: and data: protocols in URLs via urlTransform
markdown_security.custom_components: Use custom components for code blocks with syntax highlighting if needed

rolling_window.implementation: Apply rolling window logic in useChat hook before saving to localStorage
rolling_window.pruning_strategy: Remove oldest messages first when maxMessages exceeded
rolling_window.system_messages: Preserve system messages if preserveSystemMessages is true
rolling_window.performance: Limit to 20-50 messages to prevent localStorage quota issues

react_patterns.component_isolation: MarkdownRenderer should be a reusable, independent component
react_patterns.memoization: Use React.memo for MarkdownRenderer to prevent unnecessary re-renders
react_patterns.error_boundaries: Wrap markdown rendering in error boundary to handle parsing errors

css_styling.custom_css: Use app/styles/ for all styling (no Tailwind)
css_styling.markdown_styling: Create markdown.css module for markdown-specific styles
css_styling.code_blocks: Style code blocks with dark theme and proper spacing
css_styling.responsive: Ensure markdown content is responsive on mobile devices

storage_best_practices.error_handling: Handle QuotaExceededError gracefully with user notification
storage_best_practices.validation: Validate stored data structure before loading from localStorage
storage_best_practices.fallback: Provide fallback to empty array if localStorage data is corrupted

files_to_modify: lib/hooks/useChat.ts - Add rolling window logic and update ChatMessage type
lib/types/ai.ts - Add markdown-related types if needed
css_best_practices: Use custom CSS classes from app/styles/ (no Tailwind)
Style code blocks with proper syntax highlighting colors
Ensure links have proper hover states and external link indicators
Style blockquotes with left border and background color
Style tables with proper borders and responsive behavior
